vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential thermal dissipation issues from avionics bay.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling ducts and thermal management systems.

risk.desc: Risk of structural integrity under extreme maneuvering loads.

risk.desc: Material selection may not be optimal for the environmental conditions (-20 to +50C, rain/dust/salt).
risk.mit: Conduct material testing under the specified environmental conditions.

risk.desc: The tilt servo may not have sufficient torque to handle the load in all flight conditions.
risk.mit: Perform a torque analysis and adjust the servo if necessary.

risk.desc: The clearance arc may not provide sufficient clearance for the nacelle rotation.
risk.mit: Review the clearance arc dimensions and adjust if necessary.

risk.desc: The motor and ESC pockets may not be adequately secured in the event of high G-forces.
risk.mit: Add additional fastening points or use a different mounting method.

risk.desc: The access cover may not be easily removable for maintenance purposes.
risk.mit: Design the access cover to be easily removable without tools.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on tilt axis due to high heat generation from servo.
risk.mit: Implement a more efficient heat sink or additional cooling mechanism.

verify.rule: Each part_tree child must have at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops and all required evidence_features must appear in the part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: Mass estimate is within acceptable range.
verify.rule: The cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value and within the mass budget.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in the geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal definitions in neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must have matching connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature in neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence is present for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces are defined.
verify.rule: Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

verify.value: Harnesses are routed through visible raceways or protected channels.
verify.rule: Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels.

verify.value: All access features are represented by geometry.
verify.rule: Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover.

verify.value: Every cable exit shows strain relief and respects minimum bend radius.
verify.rule: Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius.

verify.value: Connectors are reachable and have keying or labeling.
verify.rule: Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.

verify.value: Assembly sequence is defined with tool, torque, and datum per step.
verify.rule: cad_brief includes ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.

verify.value: Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, pocket, drill, subtract.
verify.rule: Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, pocket, drill, subtract. Subtractive features and finishing features are present.

verify.value: Dimensions are physically plausible for the subsystem scale.
verify.rule: Dimensions match tiltrotor scale: 200-1500mm wingspan, 50-300mm fuselage dia. Wall thickness, hole diameters, fillet radii are physically plausible.

risk.desc: Potential thermal dissipation issues due to sensor heat load.
risk.mit: Include additional thermal dissipation paths and conductive materials.

risk.desc: Risk of cable strain due to improper routing.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have proper strain relief and routing.

risk.desc: Potential mis-mating risk due to lack of connector keying.
risk.mit: Add keying or labeling to connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly errors due to ambiguous build sequence.
risk.mit: Define clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

risk.desc: Potential structural integrity issues due to insufficient fastener locking evidence.
risk.mit: Ensure visible locking evidence is present for critical joints.
